falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above its 200-day moving average by at least 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would contradict the pattern's implied bearish bias and invalidate the HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day average true range (ATR) increases by 200% compared to the current level
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a volatility spike would indicate a blowoff top scenario, directly contradicting the current UNKNOWN verdict

falsification_conditions.condition: The U.S. unemployment rate drops below 4.5% in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This strong labor market signal would invalidate the pattern's implied economic weakness and prove the HOLD signal incorrect

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
